intended_use: Canvas Dx is intended for use by healthcare providers as an aid in the diagnosis of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) for patients ages 18 months through 72 months who are at risk for developmental delay
intended_use_full: Canvas Dx is intended for use by healthcare providers as an aid in the diagnosis of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) for patients ages 18 months through 72 months who are at risk for developmental delay based on concerns of a parent, caregiver, or healthcare provider. The device is not intended for use as a stand-alone diagnostic device but as an adjunct to the diagnostic process.
ground_truth: Clinical reference standard reviewed by 3 clinical specialists
other_metrics: Determinate Rate (percent of users who received a positive or negative result): 31.76% (CI: 63.58%-87.67%)
